title: Hiring Production Engineer at Apollo Tyres Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Hiring Production Engineer at Apollo Tyres Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Apollo Tyres Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Chennai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Apollo Tyres Advisory Limited:
Apollo Tyres Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Tyres Advisory Limited!
